name: Timeline
purpose: Chronological knowledge timeline for company facts, announcements, and market events.

structures.name: Event Item
structures.notes: Vertical rail with node markers; each item carries a date and short body.

structures.name: Sourced Fact
structures.notes: Fact item exposes a trailing provenance chip linking to the raw snapshot.

structures.name: Grouped by Date
structures.notes: Optional sticky date headers group same-day entries.

interactionNotes: Node color encodes type using chart and accent tokens, with text labels alongside.
Keep the rail thin and quiet; emphasis comes from titles, not the connector.
